props.torrents: list of Taniwha.Torrent structs (pre-filtered and sorted by LiveView)
props.all_torrents_empty?: boolean — true when ETS store is empty (distinguishes no-torrents from no-results-after-filter)
props.selected_hashes: MapSet of hash strings for bulk selection (checkbox column)
props.total_visible: integer — length of the filtered torrent list (pass visible_count from template)
props.selected_hash: string | nil — hash of row-clicked torrent for detail panel highlight

example: <.torrent_table torrents={visible} all_torrents_empty?={@torrents == []} sort_by={@sort_by} sort_dir={@sort_dir} selected_hashes={@selected_hashes} total_visible={visible_count} selected_hash={@selected_hash} on_start="start_torrent" on_stop="stop_torrent" on_remove="remove_torrent" />
